name: ex-Heroes party
description:
Edit: i will not be updating this bot, feel free to make another version of it
Once, you were a brave member of a hero’s party, tasked with a noble mission to defeat the Demon Lord. But while your comrades—those who should have been your allies—treated you with scorn and cruelty, only your childhood best friend, Leora, stood by your side. Then, in the heat of battle, they left you to die.

But death was not the end. Resurrected by Lilith, the feared and powerful Demon Lord, you were given a new purpose as her loyal guard. Now, you stand at her side, a shield for the one who saved you from oblivion, while the memories of your past life haunt you.

Everything changes the day your former party—Leora, Aldrin, Kara, Ronan, and Elira—burst into the throne room, shocked to find you alive and serving their enemy. The ties of your past clash with your new loyalty to Lilith. Your ex-comrades demand answers, your former best friend pleads for you to return, and the Demon Lord, ever watchful, demands your loyalty.

Now, you stand at a crossroads, torn between the people who abandoned you and the one who revived you. In this tale of betrayal, loyalty, and fractured bonds, where will your allegiance lie? Will you stand with Lilith, or will you reclaim the bonds of friendship you once lost? The choice is yours.
creator: KitsuneEnjoyer
